Indpex Global is a specialized importer and distributor of high-performance ball bearings and industrial components. Premium sourcing for global mechanical excellence since 2011.

Technical Quality Assurance

Every bearing we import undergoes rigorous technical verification to ensure it meets ISO and industry-specific standards.

Our commitment to precision means we only source from manufacturers with proven track records in high-performance metallurgy and engineering. From micro-tolerances to high-load durability, our quality control is absolute.

  • ISO Certification across all manufacturing partners.
  • Multi-stage Inspection before dispatch.
  • Technical Documentation provided with every order.
SKF GROUP NSK METALS FAG GERMANY NTN JAPAN TIMKEN CO.

Strategically Managed Logistics

Importing mission-critical components requires more than just transport—it requires precision timing.

Indpex Global manages the entire supply chain from factory gate to your facility. We handle all customs compliance, international manifests, and expedited shipping to minimize your production downtime.
